```{r}
    Pocilloporidae = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Pocillopora:Stylophora), na.rm = TRUE), #grouping Pocilloporidae genera
    Poritidae = rowSums(dplyr::select(., `Porites - branching`:Goniopora), na.rm = TRUE), #grouping Poritidae genera
    `Other Hard coral` = rowSums(dplyr::select(., `Favia (plocoid)`:`other submassive`), na.rm = TRUE), # Grouping other hard corals
    `Soft coral` = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Lobophytum:`Soft-other`), na.rm = TRUE), #soft coral categories
    `Brown MA` = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Sargassum:Lobophora), na.rm = TRUE), #brown macroalgae categories
    `Red MA` = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Asparagopsis:Jania), na.rm = TRUE), #red macroalgae
    `Green MA`= rowSums(dplyr::select(., Halimeda:Valonia), na.rm = TRUE), #green macroalgae
    `Sand and Rubble` = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Sand:Rubble), na.rm = TRUE), #sand, rubble, and combo
    Turf = rowSums(dplyr::select(., `Pavement/EAM`:`Dead massive`), na.rm = TRUE), #Turfing substrata (dead corals + EAM)
    Other = rowSums(dplyr::select(., Sponge:Clam), na.rm = TRUE), #other invertes
    Zoantharian = rowSums(dplyr::select(., `Zoantharian - Red`:`Zoantharian - Green`), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

PIT <- PIT |> 
  dplyr::select(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, Transect, Acroporidae:Zoantharian,CCA, Cyanobacteria, Halophila)

# PIT <- PIT |> 
#   mutate(
#     sum = rowSums(across(Acroporidae:Halophila), na.rm = TRUE) 
#   )

#summary(PIT$sum) #check that the number of points = 50 per transect

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    across(Acroporidae:Halophila, ~ .x * 2) #multiply by two to get out of 100%
  )


join_pit <- PIT |> 
  group_by(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site) |> 
  summarise(
    mean_aco = mean(Acroporidae),
    sd_aco = sd(Acroporidae),
    mean_poci = mean(Pocilloporidae),
    sd_poci = sd(Pocilloporidae),
    mean_por = mean(Poritidae),
    sd_por = sd(Poritidae),
    PIT = n()
  )

st_join <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |> 
  group_by(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site) |> 
  summarise(
    acro_mean_st = mean(Acroporidae),
    poci_mean_st = mean(Pocilloporidae),
    por_mean_st = mean(Poritid),
    acro_sd_st = sd(Acroporidae),
    poci_sd_st = sd(Pocilloporidae),
    por_sd_st = sd(Poritid)
  )


combined_averages <- left_join(join_pit, st_join)
```

### 3.2.1. Acroporidae

```{r}
Acro <- combined_averages |> 
  filter(acro_mean_st > 0)
gamma_avg_Acroporidae_int <- glmmTMB(acro_mean_st ~ mean_aco*Shelf +(1 | Reef/Site), 
         family = Gamma(link = "log"), data = Acro)
gamma_avg_Acroporidae_fixed <- glmmTMB(acro_mean_st ~ mean_aco +(1 | Reef/Site) + (1 | Year), 
         family = Gamma(link = "log"), data = Acro)
# rng <- range(Acro$mean_aco, na.rm = TRUE)
# 
# pred <- ggpredict(
#   gamma_avg_Acroporidae_int,
#   terms = c(sprintf("mean_aco [%f:%f]", rng[1], rng[2]), "Shelf")
# )

pred <- ggpredict(
  gamma_avg_Acroporidae_int,
  terms = c("mean_aco", "Shelf")
)

#produces a pred with 9 values of acroporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

acro_benthic_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
 labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted recruits ( " * tile^{-1} * ")"),
       title = expression(atop("Acroporidae", "gamma (log-link) average % cover x shelf" )),
       colour = "Shelf",
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group, scale = "free_y")+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

  

acro_benthic_st
```

### 3.2.2 Pocilloporidae

```{r}
Poci <- combined_averages |> 
  filter(poci_mean_st > 0)

ln_avg_poci_fixed <- glmmTMB(poci_mean_st ~ mean_poci +(1 | Reef/Site), 
        family = "lognormal", data = Poci)

pred <- ggpredict(
  ln_avg_poci_fixed,
  terms = c("mean_poci")
)

#produces a pred with 9 values of pocilloporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

poci_benthic_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, 
                                    #colour = group
                                    )) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, 
                  #fill = group
                  ),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted recruits ( " * tile^{-1} * ")"),
       title = expression(atop("Pocilloporidae", "Log-normal"))) +
  theme_classic()

poci_benthic_st
```

### 3.2.3. Poritidae

```{r}
Por <- combined_averages |> 
  filter(por_mean_st > 0)
ln_avg_Poritid_fixed <- glmmTMB(por_mean_st ~ mean_por + (1 | Reef/Site), 
        family = "lognormal", data = Por)

pred <- ggpredict(
  ln_avg_Poritid_fixed,
  terms = c("mean_por")
)

#produces a pred with 9 values of acroporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

por_benthic_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, 
                                   #colour = group
                                   )) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, 
                  #fill = group
                  ),
              alpha = 0.2, 
              colour = NA) +
  labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted recruits ( " * tile^{-1} * ")"),
       title = expression(atop("Poritidae", "lognormal"))) +
  theme_classic()

por_benthic_st
```

```{r}
ggarrange(acro_benthic_st, poci_benthic_st, por_benthic_st, 
          labels = c("A", "B", "C"),
          ncol = 1,
          nrow = 3
          )

ggsave(filename = "figures/benthic_and_recruitment.PDF",
       width = 189,
       height = 220,
       unit = "mm")
```


# 4. Larval supply and Juveniles

## 4.1. Spatial Patterns

Load data for these models
```{r}
combine_belt_st <- left_join(join_belt, Join_Coral)
```

```{r}
combine_belt_st <- combine_belt_st |> 
  mutate(Year_start = as.numeric(substr(Year, 1, 4)))
```

```{r}
gropd_df2 <- combine_belt_st %>%
  arrange(Shelf, Reef, Site, Year_start) %>%   # make sure data are ordered
  group_by(Reef, Site) %>%              # or group_by(Reef) if Site not needed
  mutate(
    st_mean_acro_lag1 = lag(st_mean_acro, 1),
    st_mean_poci_lag1 = lag(st_mean_poci, 1),
    st_mean_por_lag1 = lag(st_mean_por, 1),
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
gropd_df2 <- gropd_df2 |> 
  mutate(Shelf, factor(Shelf, levels = c("Inner", "Mid", "Outer"), ordered = TRUE))
```


### 4.1.1. Acroporidae

*note set maximum value for mid and outer shelf*

```{r}
#model
model_df_acro <- gropd_df2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_acro))


ln_acro_juv_st_int <- glmmTMB(mean_acro ~ scale(st_mean_acro_lag1, scale = FALSE) * Shelf + (1|Reef/Site),
              family = "lognormal",
           data = model_df_acro)
summary(ln_acro_juv_st_int)
summary(model_df_acro$st_mean_acro_lag1)
emmeans(ln_acro_juv_st_int, ~Shelf, type = "response") #note for victor, pls help
regrid


pred <- ggpredict(
  ln_acro_juv_st_int,
  terms = c("st_mean_acro_lag1 [all]", "Shelf")
)
# pred <- ggpredict(
#   ln_acro_juv_st_int,
#   terms = c("st_mean_acro_lag1 [all]", "Shelf"),
#   type = "link"
# )

acro_juv_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  labs(x= expression("Recruits (" * tile^{-1} * ") (t)"),
       y = expression(atop("Predicted juvenile colonies ",  "(10"~m^{-2}*") (t + 1)")),
       colour = "Shelf",
       title = expression(atop("Acroporidae", "Log-normal average Acroporidae recruits x Shelf")),
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group, scale = "free_y")+
  theme_classic()+scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))
  

acro_juv_st
```

```{r}
pred <- ggpredict(
  ln_acro_juv_st_int,
  terms = c("st_mean_acro_lag1 [all]", "Shelf")
)

inner_df <- pred %>% filter(group == "Inner")
mid_df   <- pred %>% filter(group == "Mid")
outer_df <- pred %>% filter(group == "Outer")

plot_fun <- function(df, xlim_vals = NULL, title_text = NULL) {
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
                alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(title = title_text) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F")) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")  # avoid repeated legends
  
  if (!is.null(xlim_vals)) {
    p <- p + coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim_vals)
  }
  
  return(p)
}

model_df_acro |> filter(Shelf == "Outer") |> summarise(min = min(st_mean_acro), max = max(st_mean_acro))
model_df_acro |> filter(Shelf == "Mid") |> summarise(min = min(st_mean_acro), max = max(st_mean_acro))

p_inner <- plot_fun(inner_df, title_text = "Inner shelf")

p_mid   <- plot_fun(mid_df, xlim_vals = c(0, 100), title_text = "Mid shelf")

p_outer <- plot_fun(outer_df, xlim_vals = c(0, 20), ylim_vals = c(0, 100), title_text = "Outer shelf")

final_plot <- (p_inner | p_mid | p_outer) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Acroporidae: Log-normal recruits × Shelf",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  )

final_plot & 
  labs(
    x = expression("Recruits (" * tile^{-1} * ") (t)"),
    y = expression(atop("Predicted juvenile colonies ", "(10"~m^{-2}*") (t + 1)"))
  )
```


*Try to work out what to do with those whack outer shelf values*
### 4.1.2. Pocilloporidae

```{r}
model_df_poci <- gropd_df2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_poci))

ln_poci_juv_st_fixed <- glmmTMB(mean_poci ~ scale(st_mean_poci_lag1, scale = FALSE) + Shelf + (1|Reef/Site),
              family = "lognormal",
           data = model_df_poci)

pred <- ggpredict(
  ln_poci_juv_st_fixed,
  terms = c("st_mean_poci_lag1 [all]", "Shelf")
)

poci_juv_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  labs(x= expression("Recruits (" * tile^{-1} * ") (t)"),
       y = expression(atop("Predicted juvenile colonies", "(10"~m^{-2}*") (t + 1)")),
       colour = "Shelf",
       title = expression(atop("Pocilloporidae", "Log-normal average Pocilloporidae recruits + Shelf")),
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group)+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

poci_juv_st
```

### 4.1.3. Poritidae

```{r}
model_df_por <- gropd_df2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_por))

model_df_por <- model_df_por |> 
  filter(mean_por > 0)

gamma_por_juv_st_fixed <- glmmTMB(mean_por ~ scale(st_mean_por_lag1, scale = FALSE) + Shelf + (1|Reef/Site),
              family = Gamma(link = "log"),
           data = model_df_por)

pred <- ggpredict(
  gamma_por_juv_st_fixed,
  terms = c("st_mean_por_lag1 [all]", "Shelf")
)

por_juv_st <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  labs(x= expression("Recruits (" * tile^{-1} * ") (t)"),
       y = expression(atop("Predicted juvenile colonies", " (10"~m^{-2}*") (t + 1)")),
       colour = "Shelf",
       title = expression(atop("Poritidae", "Gamma (log-link) average Poritidae recruits + Shelf")),,
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group)+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

por_juv_st
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
Juv_st_relationship <- ggarrange(acro_juv_st, poci_juv_st, por_juv_st, ncol =1, nrow =3, common.legend = TRUE,
          labels = c("A", "B", "C"))

ggsave(Juv_st_relationship,
       file = "figures/juv_st_relationship_fig.PDF",
       height = 240,
       width = 189,
       unit = "mm")
```


# 5. Composition Plot Combined

```{r}
# Make all nmds one column

NMDS_combined <- ggarrange(p1, belt_A, Benthic_A, ncol =3, labels = c("A", "C", "E"), common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom", widths = c(0.8, 0.8, 1))
NMDS_combined

Envfit_combined <- ggarrange(p2, belt_B, Benthic_B, ncol =3, labels = c("B", "D", "F"), widths = c(0.8, 0.8, 1))
Envfit_combined

Complete_Composition <- ggarrange(NMDS_combined, Envfit_combined, ncol = 1, heights = c(1.1,0.9))
Complete_Composition
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ggsave(filename = "Complete_composition.PDF",
       plot = Complete_Composition,
       width = 250,
       height = 200,
       units = "mm")
```


```{r}
ST_NMDS <- ggarrange(p1, p2, ncol = 1, labels = c("A", "B"))

belt_Figure <- ggarrange(belt_A, belt_B, labels = c("C", "D"), ncol = 1)

Benthic_Figure <- ggarrange(
  Benthic_A, Benthic_B, labels = c("E", "F"), ncol = 1
)

# complete_composition <- ggarrange(ST_NMDS, belt_Figure, Benthic_Figure, widths = c(0.8, 0.8, 1), ncol = 3)
# complete_composition
```

# 6. Brood stock and juveniles

```{r}
# Benthic Data
PIT <- read_csv("PIT_final.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, ~replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, as.numeric))

PIT <- PIT %>% 
  filter(Year %in% c("2021-22", "2022-23", "2023-24", "2024-25", "2025-26"))

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Vicky-HS", "Vickys") ~ "Vicky-HS",
      Site %in% c("Turtle Beach", "TurtleB-CooksP") ~ "TurtleB-CooksP",
      Site %in% c("Lag2-Trimodal", "Lagoon") ~ "Lag2-Trimodal",
      Site == "Turtle South - Front (Sargassum)" ~ "TS_Crest",
      Site == "Turtle South - Coral" ~ "TS_Back",
      Site == "Turtle North - front" ~ "TN_Crest",
      TRUE ~ Site
    ),
    Reef = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Day 1", "Day 2", "Day 3") ~ "Day",
      Site %in% c("Hicks 1", "Hicks 2", "Hicks 3") ~ "Hicks",
      Site %in% c("Mac 1", "Mac 2", "Mac 3") ~ "MacGillivray",
      Site %in% c("TN_Back", "TN_coral", "TN_Crest") ~ "Turtle N",
      Site %in% c("TS_Back", "TS_Channel", "TS_Crest") ~ "Turtle S",
      Site %in% c("TurtleB-CooksP", "Lag2-Trimodal", "Vicky-HS") ~ "Lizard",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )  )


PIT<- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Shelf = factor(Shelf),
    Reef = factor(Reef),
    Site = factor(Site))

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Acroporidae_PIT = rowSums(across(`Acropora - branching`:Montipora), na.rm = TRUE),
    Pocilloporidae_PIT = rowSums(across(Pocillopora:Stylophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    Poritidae_PIT = rowSums(across(`Porites - branching`:Goniopora), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Other Hard coral` = rowSums(across(`Favia (plocoid)`:`other submassive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Soft coral` = rowSums(across(Lobophytum:`Soft-other`), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Brown MA` = rowSums(across(Sargassum:Lobophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Red MA` = rowSums(across(Asparagopsis:Jania), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Green MA` = rowSums(across(Halimeda:Valonia), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Sand and Rubble` = rowSums(across(Sand:Rubble), na.rm = TRUE),
    Turf = rowSums(across(`Pavement/EAM`:`Dead massive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    Other = rowSums(across(Sponge:Clam), na.rm = TRUE),
    Zoantharian = rowSums(across(`Zoantharian - Red`:`Zoantharian - Green`), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    across(Acroporidae_PIT:Poritidae_PIT, ~ .x * 2) #multiply by two to get out of 100%
  )

PIT_adult <- PIT |> select(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, Transect, Acroporidae_PIT, Pocilloporidae_PIT, Poritidae_PIT)

```

```{r}
Belt_family <- Belt_10m |> 
  dplyr::select(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, Transect, Acroporidae, Pocilloporidae, Poritidae)

# belt_family_long <- Belt_family |>  pivot_longer(cols = Acroporidae:Poritidae, names_to = "Family", values_to = "juvenile_density")
# 
# belt_detailed_long <- belt_detailed_long |> 
#   group_by(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, genus) |> 
#   summarise(
#     mean_juv = mean(juvenile_density),
#     sd_juv = sd(juvenile_density)
#   )
```

```{r}
combined_juv_cover <- left_join(PIT_adult, Belt_family)

combined_juv_cover <- combined_juv_cover |> 
  mutate(
    Shelf = factor(Shelf, levels = c("Inner", "Mid", "Outer"))
  )
```

Despite not being interested in across the shelf differences, as shelf has only three levels there are two few levels for a stable random effect


From this I would say we can only really do Acropora, Porites, and Pocillopora analysis because they have medians not equal to 0

## 6.1. Acropora

```{r}
nbin_avg_Acro_int <- glmmTMB(Acroporidae ~ Acroporidae_PIT * Shelf + (1|Reef/Site/Transect), 
         family = "nbinom2", data = combined_juv_cover)

pred <- ggpredict(
  nbin_avg_Acro_int,
  terms = c("Acroporidae_PIT", "Shelf")
)

#produces a pred with 9 values of acroporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

acro_benthic_juv <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
 labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted juvenile colonies (10 "~m^{-2}*")"),
       title = expression(atop("Acroporidae", "nbin % cover x shelf" )),
       colour = "Shelf",
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group)+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

acro_benthic_juv
```


## 6.2. Pocillopora

```{r}
nbin_avg_Poci_fixed2 <- glmmTMB(Pocilloporidae ~ Pocilloporidae_PIT + Shelf + (1|Reef/Site/Transect), 
         family = "nbinom2", data = combined_juv_cover)

pred <- ggpredict(
  nbin_avg_Poci_fixed2,
  terms = c("Pocilloporidae_PIT", "Shelf")
)


#produces a pred with 9 values of acroporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

poci_benthic_juv <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
 labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted juvenile colonies (10 "~m^{-2}*")"),
       title = expression(atop("Pocilloporidae", "nbin % cover x shelf" )),
       colour = "Shelf",
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group)+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

poci_benthic_juv

```


## 6.3. Poritidae

```{r}
nbin_avg_Por_int <- glmmTMB(Poritidae ~ Poritidae_PIT * Shelf + (1|Site), 
         family = "nbinom2", data = combined_juv_cover)

pred <- ggpredict(
  nbin_avg_Por_int,
  terms = c("Poritidae_PIT", "Shelf")
)

#produces a pred with 9 values of acroporidae cover, and represents the population-level prediction (random effects set to zero) is usually what you want for interpretation and plotting the relationship.

por_benthic_juv <- ggplot(pred, aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
 labs(x= expression("Observed cover (%)"),
       y = expression("Predicted juvenile colonies (10 "~m^{-2}*")"),
       title = expression(atop("Poritidae", "nbin % cover x shelf" )),
       colour = "Shelf",
       fill = "Shelf") +
  facet_wrap(~group)+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))

por_benthic_juv
```


```{r}
benthic_juv<- ggarrange(acro_benthic_juv, poci_benthic_juv, por_benthic_juv, ncol = 1,
          common.legend = TRUE,
          labels = c("A", "B", "C"))

ggsave(filename = "benthic_juvenile.PDF",
  plot = benthic_juv,
       height = 240, width = 189, unit = "mm")
```
